# `Inc`

**Systems:** MOS6502, Z80, Z180, PX86, M6809  
**Parameters:** `a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>Inc( [address] );</h3>
<ul>
    <li>[address] - the address to increment</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Increases the value at the address with 1.  Creates an inc directive in assembler.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
inc(^$d020);        // inc $d020 in assembler
inc(my_variable);   // inc my_variable
inc(my_array[i]);   // inc my_array,x
</code>



</div>
